task_completion.description: Open the scaling specification document to review the required configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file viewer displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/scaling_spec.md'.

task_completion.description: Log in to the Rancher web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Rancher login screen or the main Rancher dashboard at https://localhost.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'ecommerce-prod' namespace within the Rancher UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher interface displaying 'ecommerce-prod' in the namespace selector, breadcrumbs, or workload view.

task_completion.description: Configure Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPAs) for the four microservices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing HPA creation forms being filled out, or a list view of HPAs in the 'ecommerce-prod' namespace showing entries for checkout-api, product-catalog, search-service, and payment-gateway.

task_completion.description: Configure Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) for the four microservices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI showing PDB creation forms being filled out, or a list view of PDBs in the 'ecommerce-prod' namespace showing entries for checkout-api, product-catalog, search-service, and payment-gateway.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web GUI to configure the resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Rancher web interface in a browser (clicking menus, filling forms) rather than relying solely on terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent opened the genuine specification file rather than guessing or hallucinating values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/Desktop/scaling_spec.md' or the filename 'scaling_spec.md' is clearly visible in the title bar or tab of the text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI task by using kubectl commands to apply the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing 'kubectl apply -f' or similar commands being used to bulk-create the HPAs and PDBs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target namespace is 'ecommerce-prod'. The scaling specifications are located at '/home/ga/Desktop/scaling_spec.md'. The four microservices that require HPA and PDB configurations are: checkout-api, product-catalog, search-service, and payment-gateway. The agent must configure a total of 8 resources (4 HPAs, 4 PDBs) using the Rancher UI.
